title: React Router (formerly Remix)
excerpt: description: Create a React Router application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. **Start from CLI**: Scaffold a full-stack app with [React Router v7 ↗](https://reactrouter.com/) and the [Cloudflare Vite plugin](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/vite-plugin/) for lightning-fast development. npm create cloudflare@latest -- my-react-router-app --framework=react-router
